Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Now that we've covered the types of weapons and sensors available to our helicopters, let's use the helicopter to prosecute the noise contact.

Select the HSS-2B from Formation Manager, then place a pattern of sonobuoys around the noise contact. You can hold Ctrl to place a preset pattern, or place them manually by holding Shift and right clicking around the Tactical Display. Hold Ctrl+Shift to set a larger pattern.

Note: sonobuoys can be placed either above or below the layer. Right click on the AN/SSQ-53 in the bottom bar to select above or below. You can use the 'Intermittent' pattern to place one above and the next one below. It is recommended to place buoys above and below the layer to maximize the chances of detecting the contact!
